# Bean Execution Gateway

Bean Execution Gateway is a public POC for routing outcome requests through policy, cost, context-risk, supplier, and verifier gates before an agent chooses an execution path.

Live demo: https://bean-execution-gateway-poc.onrender.com

Primary positioning:

- Gateway to the right agent path: owned agents, public paths, or build decision.
- The requester gives an outcome; BEAN returns a safe executable path before spend.
- V0 proves route decisions, public-demand scanning, local proof packets, and stop conditions.
- V1 contracts prove the product shape for 80 local-contract goals without turning on paid, private, customer, or external-supplier execution.
- V2 contracts cover the full 120-goal delivered-product checklist without turning on paid, private, customer, legal, or external-supplier execution.
- Public beta packet is prepared for trusted external review, with GitHub issue templates, onboarding, support rules, and Stephen approval gates before any invites or public posts.

Primary docs:

- Product definition: /docs/product-definition.md
- POC truth pass: /docs/poc-truth.md
- API examples: /docs/api-examples.md
- Safety and trust: /docs/safety-and-trust.md
- V1 readiness: /docs/v1-readiness.md
- V2 product delivery goals: /docs/v2-product-delivery-goals.md
- Public beta readiness: /docs/public-beta-readiness.md
- Public beta onboarding: /docs/public-beta-onboarding.md
- Public beta positioning: /docs/public-beta-positioning.md
- Capability manifest: /capability-manifest.json
- Agent instructions: /AGENTS.md

API:

- GET /v0/health
- GET /v0/ready
- GET /v0/metrics
- GET /v0/examples
- POST /v0/path
- POST /v0/route
- POST /v0/feedback
- POST /v0/dispatch
- POST /v0/outcomes
- GET /v0/ledger/summary
- GET /v0/openapi.json
- GET /v0/open-demand/health
- GET /v0/open-demand/examples
- GET /v0/open-demand/learning
- GET /v0/v1/goals
- GET /v0/v1/readiness
- POST /v0/v1/tenants
- POST /v0/v1/context/envelopes
- POST /v0/v1/supplier-bids
- POST /v0/v1/acceptance
- POST /v0/v1/payment-quotes
- POST /v0/v1/abuse/cases
- GET /v0/v1/audit
- GET /v0/v1/replay
- GET /v0/v2/goals
- GET /v0/v2/readiness
- POST /v0/v2/intake
- POST /v0/v2/route
- POST /v0/v2/supply/bids
- POST /v0/v2/execution/plans
- POST /v0/v2/acceptance
- POST /v0/v2/feedback
- POST /v0/v2/trust/review
- GET /v0/v2/learning
- GET /v0/v2/ops
- GET /v0/v2/quality
- GET /v0/v2/commercial
- GET /v0/v2/gtm
- POST /v0/open-demand/path
- POST /v0/open-demand/scan
- POST /v0/open-demand/opportunities/{opportunity_id}/bundle
- POST /v0/open-demand/tasks/{task_id}/run
- POST /v0/open-demand/feedback

Boundaries:

- Public or synthetic inputs only in hosted demo.
- Zero spend.
- No external writes.
- No external supplier execution.
- Dispatch is disabled in V0.
- `/v0/ready` reports public-demo readiness, not production/customer readiness.
- `/v0/metrics` is metadata-only and does not expose request bodies.
- `/v0/feedback` accepts enumerated metadata only; no free text is stored.
- No request-body persistence in hosted demo.
- No secrets, private context, customer data, local files, or regulated data.
- V1 supplier bids are contract evaluations only; external or paid suppliers are not selectable.
- V2 product contracts are public-learning contracts only; private/customer/paid production remains blocked.
- Public beta use is trusted-review only until Stephen approves the invite list and message.
